sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Hong Kong stocks slide on soft China economic data, fading US rate cut bets
feed.summary: Hong Kong stocks fell by the most in a week, triggered by China's sluggish economic data, uncertainty over an interest-rate cut in the US and lofty valuations of artificial intelligence companies. The Hang Seng Index slipped 0.9 per cent to 26,833.92 as of 10.21am local time.

feed.title: Bitfarms plunges 18% after plan to wind down Bitcoin mining ops

feed.title: China's economic slowdown deepens in October as housing slump worsens and investments shrink more than expected
